tasks.instruction: Dopasuj nazwy geograficzne (1–6) do ich opisów (A–H). Dwa opisy zostały podane dodatkowo i nie pasują do żadnego elementu.

options.text: This is the world's longest river, flowing northward through northeastern Africa and emptying into the Mediterranean Sea.
This is the world's highest mountain above sea level. It is located in the Himalayas on the border between Nepal and Tibet.
This is the largest ocean in the world, covering more than 30% of Earth's surface and stretching between the Americas, Asia, and Australia.
This is the world's largest hot desert, covering most of North Africa. Very little rain falls there and temperatures can be extreme.
This is the world's largest rainforest, located mainly in Brazil. It is home to an enormous variety of plants and animals.
This is the deepest lake in the world, located in Siberia, Russia. It holds about 20% of the world's unfrozen surface fresh water.
This is the longest mountain range in the world, running along the western coast of South America through several countries.
This is the world's smallest continent and one of its largest countries. It is surrounded entirely by ocean and is famous for its unique wildlife.
